steps.title: Divide every term
steps.content: An equivalent equation can be made by dividing both sides by the same nonzero number. Here every term is divisible by $2$.

steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content:
Divide each term by $2$.
$$\frac{6x+12}{2}=\frac{24}{2}$$
$$3x+6=12$$
The answer is D.
